name: 32" x 72" Wooden Arch Mirror Brown - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Minimalist Leaner, Stained Wood Frame, No Assembly Required
description: Bring convenience to your daily routine while decorating your home in style with this Wooden Arch Mirror from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Featuring an arch shape, this leaner mirror features a brown, wooden frame with clean lines for a minimalist appeal. Place this framed mirror in your vanity area or entryway to get ready for the day.
